steps.title: Expand and apply the no real solutions criterion
steps.content:
Expand the equation:
$$x(kx - 56) = -16$$
$$kx^2 - 56x + 16 = 0$$
For no real solutions, the discriminant must be negative: $b^2 - 4ac < 0$.

steps.title: Calculate and solve the discriminant inequality
Identify the least integer value
steps.content: Since $k$ is an integer and $k > 49$, the smallest integer satisfying this is $k = 50$.
